mano_cua.result_summary: Bug已确认。多次点击HTTP Load按钮(@angular/common/http)后，loading bar完全不出现，pending requests计数始终为0。对比手动Start/Complete按钮可正常触发loading bar。说明HTTP interceptor未正确拦截@angular/common/http请求，异步interceptor的Promise/Observable链路存在问题导致loading bar服务的start()方法从未被调用。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: 点击HTTP Load按钮6次，loading bar从未出现，pending count始终0。手动Start按钮可正常触发。Bug confirmed: 异步HTTP拦截器下loading bar不显示。

deploy_notes: commit 6ecb090e43, ng serve --port 4501, node-sass dart-sass shim
